overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a grand classical palace complex with massive stone columns and cobblestone pathways during golden hour. The player character walks along a curved colonnade, passes red banners, and approaches a large entrance with stairs leading to the Imperial City Palace.

events.description: ascending the initial stone stairs leading up to the colonnade platform
reaching the top of the stairs and entering the curved colonnade walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the initial stone stairs and beginning to walk along the curved colonnade path between massive pillars

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the colonnade platform
tall classical stone columns supporting the curved roof structure
high stone wall with arched openings running alongside the walkway
curved roofed walkway with repeating columns creating a grand arcade
snow-capped mountains visible in the background beyond the palace

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the base of a grand stone staircase. The player ascends the stairs and enters a curved colonnade walkway with massive stone pillars on the right and a high stone wall on the left. The warm golden hour light casts long shadows across the cobblestone path as distant snow-capped mountains become visible ahead.

events.description: red banners hanging from the palace wall come into view on the right side
text 'Imperial City Palace' appears on screen indicating arrival at the destination

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved stone pathway between the massive columns of the colonnade

entered.detail: tall red fabric banners hanging from the palace wall with gold trim
clear view of snow-covered mountain peaks in the background

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the curved colonnade walkway, the player moves deeper into the palace complex. The massive stone pillars now loom closer on the right while red banners become visible hanging from the palace wall ahead. The text 'Imperial City Palace' appears as the destination is reached, with snow-capped mountains providing a dramatic backdrop.

events.description: turning left away from the curved colonnade to face the main palace entrance building
leaving the curved colonnade behind and approaching the straight path to the entrance

agents.ego_description: turning left to face the main palace entrance building and walking toward the grand doorway

entered.detail: massive stone facade of the Imperial City Palace with tall arched doorways
decorative bronze lamp posts flanking the entrance pathway
heavy carved wooden door with metal studs at the top of the entrance stairs

segments.scene_description: The player turns left away from the curved colonnade to face the main palace entrance directly. The path opens into a plaza leading to the massive stone facade of the Imperial City Palace. Ornate lamp posts line the cobblestone path leading to a large wooden door at the top of a staircase, while the colonnade recedes to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance stairs of Imperial Palace

events.description: beginning to ascend the final grand staircase leading to the wooden entrance door
reaching the top platform of the stairs directly before the large wooden door

agents.ego_description: walking up the wide stone staircase toward the large carved wooden entrance door of the palace

entered.detail: wide grand staircase with stone steps leading up to the palace entrance
ornate stone archway surrounding the large wooden entrance door

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player ascending the grand stone staircase leading directly to the Imperial City Palace entrance. The large wooden door with its decorative stone frame dominates the view as the camera climbs the steps. The ornate lamp posts now stand at the sides of the staircase, and the colonnade is left behind as the player approaches the palace entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the base of a grand staircase through a curved colonnade and toward the imposing entrance of the Imperial City Palace. It begins by ascending stone steps into a walkway flanked by massive pillars and a high wall, where warm golden hour light casts long shadows across the cobblestones and reveals distant snow-capped mountains. As the camera moves deeper into the complex, the pillars loom closer and red banners appear along the walls before the path opens into a wide plaza. The scene then shifts as the camera turns away from the colonnade to face the palace's massive stone facade, passing ornate lamp posts that line the way. Finally, the movement culminates in a direct ascent up a grand staircase toward a large, decorative wooden door that dominates the view.
